## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Risk
- [ ] Touches auth, rate limiting, secrets, payments, or safety logic
- [ ] Changes API contracts or persisted data behavior
- [ ] Requires environment or deployment changes
